name: Joshua
answer2:
If the eight
philosophies of
avatarhood
combine into and
are made from
truth, love
& courage...
question: More?
yes:
What one thing
creates and is
created by all
truths, all love
& all courage?

name: Juliet
answer1:
Seek ye to know
how the eight
virtues form
into the three
principles.
answer2:
Seek ye to know
what one thing
the three
principles of
virtue combine
into!
question: Know ye this?

name: Jester Twin
answer1:
A jester needs
a good bard!
question:
Dost thou like
the music?
yes:
Then you should
go to Britain
for there lives
the best!

name: a guard
job:
I guard the
castle and my
liege!
answer1:
A guard must
be a valiant
warrior!
question:
Art thou the
most valiant
warrior?
yes:
Then thou should
be a guard!

name: Le Chef
look:
A person with
a white hat.
health:
Well.. All but
my finger,
which I cut!
answer1:
Food, glorious
food, to cook is
my life!
question: Do you eat?
yes:
Then thou should
try my soup!
no:
Then thou
must be a
spiritualist!

name: a reaper
health:
Not so good,
no one to eat
in here!
answer1:
There is a thing
which can kill
many!
answer2:
Knowledge of it
is found at
Buccaneer's Den!
question:
Will you seek
this thing?

name:
a nameless
prisoner
answer2:
Here I pay for
my crimes!
question:
Are you a
pirate?
yes:
You may never
complete thy
quests, for evil
makes not an
avatar!
no:
I hope that
this is true!

name: Zorin
job:
I am here
to help thee.
answer2:
Seek:
the Lycaeum,
Empath Abbey,
Serpent's Castle!
question:
Wilt thou
go hither?
yes:
Find therein all
named Antos and
ask of the bell,
book, and
candle!

name: a guard
job:
I guard the
castle and all
within.
answer2:
The castle is
fair and strong!
question:
Do you seek
Lord British?
yes:
He is on the
upper level in
the throne room.
no:
He will aid
you if you
are in need!

name: Water
answer2:
There are three
altar rooms
which connect
the bottom
levels of all
eight dungeons!
question: More?
yes:
If the correct
colors of stones
are used in the
altars, a key of
three parts can
be gained!

name: Shawn
look:
A shepherdess
both strong
and beautiful.
answer2:
I come from
a proud city.
question: Art thou proud?
no:
My towne was
destroyed for
its pride. The
ruins lie on an
isle at lat-K'J"
long-L'L"!

name: Seesha
question:
Fight ye for
Britannia?
yes:
Then seek out
the smith named
Zircon in Minoc
for he made the
mystic arms,
only they will
save thee in the
abyss!

name: Chuckles
answer2:
Speak ye unto
the waters of
the well and ask
of altars!
question:
Hast thou
an ankh?

name: a guard
answer1:
We guard the
castle and its
treasures.
question:
Do you mean
to steal?
yes:
I believe you
will find that
an unfruitful
venture.

name: Sheila
job:
I search for
the inner light.
answer1:
Seek inner light
in the shrines!
answer2:
Runes are needed
to enter
shrines!
question:
Dost thou know
of mantra?
no:
The mantra are
chants needed
to
focus thy
thoughts while
meditating.

name: Landri
job:
I am here
to warn thee!
health:
I am fine, but
thou must
go back!
answer2:
Once thou enters
thou may not
return whence
thee came!
question: Wilt thou go on?
